steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to compare the curviness of the Embarras (high sinuosity) and Luni (low sinuosity). The right answer must directly state which river is curvier.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
(D) says the Embarras's stream-to-valley ratio (its sinuosity) is greater than the Luni's — a direct comparison consistent with the data.

(A) reverses the rivers (calls Luni high-sinuosity — wrong). (B) and (C) merely define sinuosity instead of comparing the two rivers.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
